attacking_style: Explosive attacks in final 1.5-2km on ultra-steep gradients (15-20%+), often using oversized gears to maximize power over short distances. Targets summit finishes rather than long-range efforts.
team_tactics: Chronically isolated without domestique support in crucial moments. Astana's weakness in TTTs and positioning left him exposed. Solo bridging and attacks without team discouragement of chasers is recurring pattern.
terrain_preference: Ultra-steep gradients (20%+) where explosive power negates sustained watts disadvantage. Struggles in ITTs (48s+ losses to specialists) and on medium gradients against pure climbers. Crosswind awareness decent but team support absent.
vulnerability: Time trials eliminate him from balanced GT contention. Loses position catastrophically on descents without teammates. Collapses completely when health issues (stomach/nausea) emerge. Cannot sustain repeated accelerations at altitude.
key_patterns: Attacks final 200m-1.5km on steepest gradients using oversized gears, drops pure climbers (8 observations)
Loses 45-60+ seconds in ITTs to specialists, eliminating balanced GT contention (3 observations)
Catastrophic positioning errors on descents/flats without team support costs 30s-minutes (4 observations)
Health collapses (stomach issues, nausea) trigger 10-17 minute losses and abandonments (3 observations)
Solo attacks 8-25km out maintain buffers but lack gap-building power for victory (4 observations)
Cannot follow repeated accelerations by pure climbers at altitude, dropped permanently (3 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Complete career collapse 2018-2021. ITT losses, health abandonments, and eventually retirement mid-race after stomach issues and four years of declining results from 2015 Vuelta champion
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
